image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about edge AI constraints than social media does.
Context visual: Edge AI brings computing power closer to data sources, but it has its limits.
Escalation visual: Processing speed, energy consumption, and data privacy are key hurdles.
Evidence visual: Studies show that real-time processing can drain battery life significantly.
Payoff visual: So, while edge AI is revolutionary, we must tread carefully with its expectations.
Cta visual: Stay informed! Like and follow for more tech insights.
